title: Psalms, Chapter 128
description: Complete text of Psalms chapter 128 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of Psalms chapter 128 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Blessed
is every one that feareth the LORD; that walketh in his ways. <sup>2</sup>For thou shalt eat the labour of thine hands: happy
shalt
 thou
be, and
it shall be well with thee. <sup>3</sup>Thy wife
shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine house: thy children like olive plants round about thy table. <sup>4</sup>Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the LORD. <sup>5</sup>The LORD shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.

<sup>6</sup>Yea, thou shalt see thy children’s children,
and peace upon Israel.
